dialogues.en: You're sure?
With his own eyes, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 呆在这里 不要告诉任何人
dialogues.en: Stay here. Tell no one.
Help me dress.
Who knows?
My handmaiden, Talya.
Some of the servants.
I saw him last night...
before he--

dialogues.cn: 他告诉我他想立伊耿为王
dialogues.en: He told me he wished for Aegon to be king.
It is the truth.
Uttered with his own lips.

dialogues.cn: 他对我说了遗言 我是唯一听到的
dialogues.en: His last words to me and I was the only one to hear it.
And now he's dead.
What is it that could not have waited an hour?
Was Dorne invaded?
The King is dead.

dialogues.cn: 我们哀悼“安宁王”韦赛里斯……
dialogues.en: We grieve for Viserys the Peaceful...
our sovereign...
our friend.

dialogues.cn: 但他给我们留了一个礼物
dialogues.en: But he has left us a gift.

dialogues.cn: 他用最后一口气 向王后诉出了遗愿：
dialogues.en: With his last breath, he impressed upon the Queen his final wish:
that his son, Aegon...
should succeed him as Lord of the Seven Kingdoms.

dialogues.cn: 既然他有此遗愿 我们也可以安心
dialogues.en: Then we may proceed now with the full assurance
of his blessing on our long-laid plans.

dialogues.cn: 是的 有很多事情要做
dialogues.en: Yes. There is much to be done,
as we've previously discussed.

dialogues.cn: 都城守备队队长中有两位
dialogues.en: Now, there are two among the captains
of the City Watch that remain loyal to Daemon.
Let us replace them.
Lord Lannister.
The Treasury is well in hand.

dialogues.cn: 出于安全考虑 金子将会分开保存
dialogues.en: The gold will be divided for safekeeping.

dialogues.cn: 向我们的盟友 奔流城和高庭 送去渡鸦
dialogues.en: Let ravens be sent to our allies, Riverrun and Highgarden.

dialogues.cn: 如我理解无误 御前会议的成员
dialogues.en: Am I to understand that members of the small council

dialogues.cn: 一直都瞒着我 密谋把我儿子推上王座？
dialogues.en: have been planning secretly to install my son without me?

dialogues.cn: 没必要让你沾染阴谋 王后陛下
dialogues.en: My Queen, there was no need to sully you with darkling schemes.
I will not have this.

dialogues.cn: 亲耳听到你们竟然在密谋
dialogues.en: To hear that you are plotting

dialogues.cn: 要顶替掉国王选定的继承人！
dialogues.en: to replace the King's chosen heir with an imposter!

dialogues.cn: 国王的长子不能算是顶替者
dialogues.en: His firstborn son is hardly an imposter.

dialogues.cn: 有数百名领主大人和有产骑士向对公主宣誓效忠
dialogues.en: Hundreds of lords and landed knights swore fealty to the Princess.

dialogues.cn: 那是差不多20年前的事 大多数人如今都死了
dialogues.en: That was some 20 years ago. Most of them now dead.

dialogues.cn: 你听到国王之手大人的话了
dialogues.en: You heard the Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 无论密谋与否 国王改变他的主意了
dialogues.en: Plot or no, the King changed his mind.
I am six-and-seventy years old.

dialogues.cn: 我认识韦赛里斯的时间比在座的各位都要长
dialogues.en: I have known Viserys longer than any who sit at this table.

dialogues.cn: 我绝不会相信他在病榻上独身一人的时候 说出了这种话
dialogues.en: And I will not believe that he said this on his deathbed, alone,

dialogues.cn: 只有那孩子的母亲作证
dialogues.en: with only the boy's mother as a witness.
This is seizure!
It is theft! It is treason!
At the least, it is--

dialogues.cn: 注意你说的话 林曼
dialogues.en: Mind your tongue, Lyman.
The King was well last night...
by all accounts.

dialogues.cn: 在座的哪位敢发誓 他是自然死亡的？
dialogues.en: Which of you here can swear that he died of his own accord?

dialogues.cn: 毕斯柏里伯爵 你在指控在座的哪位弑君？
dialogues.en: Which of us are you accusing of regicide, Lord Beesbury?

dialogues.cn: 我不关心是你们哪一位 还是集体谋划的
dialogues.en: Whether it was one of you, or all of you, I care not.
I will have no part--
Sit down!
Ser Criston.

dialogues.cn: 扔掉剑 脱下你的白袍 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: Throw down your sword and remove your cloak, Ser Criston.

dialogues.cn: 我是你的队长 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: I am your Lord Commander, Ser Criston.
Cast down your sword.

dialogues.cn: 我无法忍受王后陛下遭受冒犯
dialogues.en: I will not suffer insults to Her Grace the Queen.

dialogues.cn: 我没被冒犯 克里斯顿爵士 你—— 把剑放下
dialogues.en: There was no insult to me, Ser Criston. Y-- Put aside your blade.
Has it come to this?
Lord Commander, enough.

dialogues.cn: 把毕斯柏里伯爵搬走吧
dialogues.en: Let us have Lord Beesbury removed.
No.

dialogues.cn: 在我们完事之前 大门必须紧闭
dialogues.en: The door remains shut until we finish our business.
Storm's End is of concern.

dialogues.cn: 我们不知道博洛斯公爵是否忠于我们
dialogues.en: We may not assume the loyalty of Lord Borros.

dialogues.cn: 但是他有四个女儿 全部未婚
dialogues.en: But he has four daughters, all of them unmarried.
The right proposal--
What of Rhaenyra?

dialogues.cn: 当然不能放前任继承人自由
dialogues.en: The former heir cannot, of course, be allowed to remain free

dialogues.cn: 为她的主张去拉拢支持
dialogues.en: and draw support to her claim.
You mean to imprison her.

dialogues.cn: 她和她的家人将有机会
dialogues.en: She and her family will be given the opportunity

dialogues.cn: 向新国王公开宣誓服从
dialogues.en: to publicly swear obeisance to the new King.
She will never bend the knee.

dialogues.cn: 戴蒙也不会 你懂他的
dialogues.en: Nor will Daemon, which you know.
You plan to kill them.
And all here accede to this.

dialogues.cn: 您的父亲是正确的 陛下
dialogues.en: Your father is correct, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 一个活着的挑战者会带来战争与杀戮
dialogues.en: A living challenger invites battle and bloodshed.
It is unsavory, yes.

dialogues.cn: 但这是为了伊耿继位做出的必要牺牲
dialogues.en: But a sacrifice we must make to secure Aegon's succession.
And then there is Daemon to consider.

dialogues.cn: 国王当然不希望任何不光彩的——
dialogues.en: The King wouldn't wish for any unsavory--
But the King did not wish...
for the murder of his daughter!

dialogues.cn: 他爱她 我不允许你否认这点
dialogues.en: He loved her. I will not have you deny this.
And yet--

dialogues.cn: 再多说一个字 我就把你赶出房间
dialogues.en: One more word and I will have you removed from this chamber
and sent to the Wall!
What do you suggest, Your Grace?
Time is of the essence.
Lord Commander Westerling...

dialogues.cn: 带着你的骑士们去龙石岛
dialogues.en: take your knights to Dragonstone.
Be quick and be clean.
I am Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.
I recognize no authority but the King's.
And until there is one...

dialogues.cn: 这里也就没有我的位置
dialogues.en: I have no place here.

dialogues.cn: 我想 我们的宿命就是渴求别人所拥有的
dialogues.en: It is our fate, I think, to crave always what is given to another.

dialogues.cn: 如果一个人拥有一样东西 另一个人就会将之夺去
dialogues.en: If one possesses a thing, the other will take it away.
Yes, Princess.
Where is Aegon?
Not here.

dialogues.cn: 他怎么没在自己房间里
dialogues.en: He's not in his rooms.
Father.
What's happened?

dialogues.cn: - 你父亲他... - 木板底 凶兽倚
dialogues.en: -Your father-- -There is a beast beneath the boards.
Oh, my dearest love.
Ser Erryk.
Where's the Prince?

dialogues.cn: 首相大人恕罪 我不知道
dialogues.en: Forgive me, Lord Hand. I do not know.
But you're sworn to protect him.

dialogues.cn: 他下了命令 让我必须离开
dialogues.en: He exploits his authority to order me away,

dialogues.cn: 又躲着不让我找到 大人
dialogues.en: and then he evades me, my Lord.

dialogues.cn: 他大概已经偷偷离开红堡
dialogues.en: I believe he may have left the Keep secretly,
gone into the city.
Find him.
Take no one else but your brother.
And remove your white cloaks.

dialogues.cn: 别让人知道你们是谁 在找什么……
dialogues.en: None can know who you are or what you seek...
including the Queen.
My Lord.

dialogues.cn: 直接带他来单独见我 伊利克爵士
dialogues.en: Bring him to me, and me alone, Ser Erryk.
What is the meaning of this?
Guard. Guard!

dialogues.cn: 红堡里没有伊耿王子的踪迹 陛下
dialogues.en: Prince Aegon's not to be found within the castle walls, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 您父亲已经派伊利克爵士去城里找他了
dialogues.en: Your father has sent Ser Erryk into the city to find him.

dialogues.cn: 伊利克爵士了解伊耿 他有优势
dialogues.en: Ser Erryk knows Aegon. He has the advantage.

dialogues.cn: 我会再次相信你和你的忠诚 克里斯顿爵士
dialogues.en: I trust again to you, Ser Criston, and to your loyalty.

dialogues.cn: 必须找到伊耿 带他来见我
dialogues.en: Aegon must be found, and he must be brought to me.
The very fate of the Seven Kingdoms depends on it.

dialogues.cn: 看在你对我 对你的王后的情分上
dialogues.en: Everything you feel for me as your Queen.
I will not fail you.
I'll come with you.
That would not be my desire, Aemond.
If anything has happened--
Cole needs me, Mother.

dialogues.cn: 了解伊耿习性的 不只伊利克爵士一个人
dialogues.en: Ser Erryk isn't the only one who knows Aegon's doings.

dialogues.cn: 在我第十三个命名日那天 伊耿带我来了丝绸街
dialogues.en: Aegon brought me to the Street of Silk on my thirteenth name day.

dialogues.cn: 他说这是作哥哥的职责
dialogues.en: It was his duty as my brother, he said,

dialogues.cn: 确保我像他一样受过教导
dialogues.en: to ensure I was as educated as he was.
At least that's what I understood him to mean.
I don't follow.

dialogues.cn: 他说“是时候滋润一下那话儿了”
dialogues.en: He said, “Time to get it wet.”

dialogues.cn: 每个女人都是圣母的化身 不能说这种亵渎的话
dialogues.en: Every woman is an image of the Mother, to be spoken of with reverence.

dialogues.cn: 昨晚 我们有位酒友不知去向
dialogues.en: Sometime last night, we...misplaced our drinking companion.

dialogues.cn: 我们知道他过去经常来照顾你们的生意
dialogues.en: Knowing that he has been, in the past, a patron of your fine establishment,

dialogues.cn: 就想着来打听他的下落
dialogues.en: we thought to inquire here as to his whereabouts.
And describe him.
That is a delicate matter.

dialogues.cn: 跟你直说吧 我们在找年轻的伊耿王子
dialogues.en: You see, the man we seek is the young Prince Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 希望你们干这一行的口风不会让我失望
dialogues.en: I may trust, I hope, in the discretion of your trade.
The Prince is not here.

dialogues.cn: 那他来过吗？或许早些时候？
dialogues.en: Has he been here? Earlier, perhaps?

dialogues.cn: 那可太早了 上次来是几年前了
dialogues.en: Quite a bit earlier. Years ago, in fact.
But more recently?
He does not frequent the Street of Silk.

dialogues.cn: 众所周知 他的品味.……
dialogues.en: His tastes are known to be...
less discriminating.
Meaning what?

dialogues.cn: 祝你好运 好爵士 祝你朋友更加好运
dialogues.en: I wish you luck, good Ser. And my best to your friend.
How you've grown.
Viserys amended his wishes.
It's as simple as that.

dialogues.cn: 你们曾宣誓效忠雷妮拉
dialogues.en: You once swore your banners to Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 现在 你们必须宣誓效忠未来的国王
dialogues.en: You must now pledge them to the future king.

dialogues.cn: 事关重大 我得先和我的族人商议
dialogues.en: I must confer first with my house on this matter.

dialogues.cn: 不明表立场 你就不能走出这个房间
dialogues.en: You'll not leave this room without declaring your intention.
I am no oath breaker.
I will not bend the knee.
Anyone else?

dialogues.cn: 费尔家族将继续效忠公主
dialogues.en: House Fell keeps its sworn oath to the Princess.
Very well.
Long live the King.
Long live the King.

dialogues.cn: 看来你也不怎么了解伊耿的喜好啊
dialogues.en: It seems you were mistaken as to Aegon's habits.

dialogues.cn: 他可能已经被雇佣兵抓走
dialogues.en: He could be in the hands of mercenaries,
on a ship to Yi Ti.
He could be dead.

dialogues.cn: 看在你母亲份上 但愿不会那样
dialogues.en: Let us hope, for your mother's sake, that is not the case.
Let's have a look.

dialogues.cn: - 去吧 - 过来 过来！
dialogues.en: -Go on. -Come here. Come here!
Get in there, you little--
Yeah!
Come on!
How old are they?
About 10 years, I should say.

dialogues.cn: 这些人让孩子们蓄指甲 磨尖牙
dialogues.en: They have them grow their nails and file the teeth.
Makes them more formidable.
Come on!

dialogues.cn: 伊耿王子在这度过了许多个夜晚
dialogues.en: Prince Aegon spends many a night in this place.

dialogues.cn: 现在你知道他是什么德行了？
dialogues.en: Do you see now what he is?

dialogues.cn: 你还没看到他的全部呢
dialogues.en: You've not seen everything.
Aegon's?

dialogues.cn: 我打赌 只是其中之一
dialogues.en: One of many, I'd wager.

dialogues.cn: 我这么一个训练有素的战士 在城里四处搜寻
dialogues.en: Here I am, trawling the city, ever the good soldier

dialogues.cn: 那个对自己与生俱来的权利毫不关心的废物
dialogues.en: in search of a wastrel who's never taken half an interest in his birthright.

dialogues.cn: 认真学历史 学哲学的人是身为次子的我
dialogues.en: 'Tis I the younger brother who studies history and philosophy,
it is I who trains with the sword,

dialogues.cn: 骑乘世界上最大的龙 那也是我
dialogues.en: who rides the largest dragon in the world.
It is I who should be--

dialogues.cn: 别人轻松得到 我们却得努力去争取 我知道那种滋味
dialogues.en: I know what it is to toil for what others are freely given.

dialogues.cn: 我们是找不到他的 科尔
dialogues.en: And we can't find him, Cole.

dialogues.cn: 你是个不愿堕落的体面人
dialogues.en: You are a decent man with no taste for depravity.
His secrets are his own...
and he's welcome to them.

dialogues.cn: 我是铁王座的下一顺位继承人
dialogues.en: I'm next in line to the throne.
Should they come looking for me,
I intend to be found.

dialogues.cn: 必须做点什么 伊耿不适合做统治者
dialogues.en: Something must be done. Aegon is unfit to rule.

dialogues.cn: 你都已经容忍王子的癖好这么多年了
dialogues.en: You tolerated the Prince's proclivities for years.

dialogues.cn: 只因这是我的誓言职责 亚历克
dialogues.en: Because it was my sworn duty, Arryk.

dialogues.cn: 把动脑子的事留给首相吧
dialogues.en: It's for the Hand to find wisdom.

dialogues.cn: 我们只要至死服从发过的誓言就好
dialogues.en: We swore an oath of service until death.
A moment of your time, m'lords.
You'll find no buyers for your wares here.

dialogues.cn: 我可以带你们去见伊耿王子
dialogues.en: I can take you to Prince Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 或者说 有个知道王子在哪里的人派我过来
dialogues.en: Rather, I am sent by one who knows where he is.

dialogues.cn: 那人会告诉你们 但要收钱
dialogues.en: Who'll tell you, for a price.

dialogues.cn: 带他过来 我们再聊聊价钱
dialogues.en: Deliver him, and we'll consider your price.

dialogues.cn: 我们夫人可不跟红堡里的仆从打交道……
dialogues.en: My mistress will not treat with the servants of the Keep...
exalted though they may be.
She'll trust this to the Hand of the King only.
Impossible.

dialogues.cn: 我相信他会想听听白蛆要告诉他什么
dialogues.en: I think he will wish to hear what the White Worm can tell him.
Halt! Hold the gate!
Let go of me!
He was fleeing from the gate.
Do you know who I am?

dialogues.cn: 我打赌是要给公主送信
dialogues.en: A warning for the Princess, I'd wager.
What say you?
The Lord Confessor presumes.
I have no love for the Princess.

dialogues.cn: 那你急急忙忙要去哪里?
dialogues.en: And where were you going then with such urgency?

dialogues.cn: 让御前执法官带下去吧
dialogues.en: Let the King's Justice take him.
Let go of me!
No! This is not right!

dialogues.cn: 你做得很好 拉里斯大人
dialogues.en: You did well, Lord Larys.
I will--

dialogues.cn: 尽我的职责罢了 首相大人
dialogues.en: Only my duty, my Lord Hand.
Who do you think you are?

dialogues.cn: 你最近和王后待在一起的时间很长
dialogues.en: You've spent many hours with the Queen of late.

dialogues.cn: 这些时间或许终究会让您受益
dialogues.en: There's no reason those hours could not, in the end, benefit you.

dialogues.cn: 出于礼貌 我愿意假定
dialogues.en: I will do you the considerable courtesy of assuming

dialogues.cn: 我今早在这里受到的冒犯有个合理的原因
dialogues.en: there is a good reason for the outrage of my treatment here this morning.

dialogues.cn: 我为失礼表示诚挚的歉意
dialogues.en: My sincerest regrets for the lack of ceremony.
The King.
And you are usurping the throne.
It was my husband's dying wish.

dialogues.cn: 不管你信不信都无关紧要
dialogues.en: Believe it or no, it is of no consequence.
Aegon will be king.

dialogues.cn: 我来这里是想让你支持我
dialogues.en: I came here to ask your support.
Well, I must credit you for your boldness.

dialogues.cn: 瓦列利安家族早就跟雷妮拉公主结盟了
dialogues.en: House Velaryon has long allied itself with the Princess Rhaenyra
and what has it gained you?

dialogues.cn: 你女儿孤零零地……死在潘托斯
dialogues.en: Your daughter dead... alone in Pentos.
Your son cuckolded.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉的继承人都不是你们家族的后代
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra's heirs are none of yours.

dialogues.cn: 是你丈夫如此轻率地想要攫取王座
dialogues.en: It is your husband who grasps so heedlessly for the throne.
And even he has abandoned you:

dialogues.cn: 孤注一掷地打了六年仗
dialogues.en: gone these six long years to fight a desperate battle,

dialogues.cn: 回来时身受重伤 或许是致命伤
dialogues.en: returning grievously, if not mortally, wounded,

dialogues.cn: 留下潮头岛夫人独自规划航线
dialogues.en: leaving the Lady of Driftmark to chart her course alone.

dialogues.cn: 我们家的族语可不是反复无常
dialogues.en: The word of my house is not fickle.

dialogues.cn: 我知道不会 但是 亲爱的堂姐……
dialogues.en: No. But, dear cousin...

dialogues.cn: 你比当今世上任何人都更明白我现在说的话
dialogues.en: you more than any soul alive understand what I say now.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮丝公主 我很爱我的夫君 但我必须说出我们都知道的事实
dialogues.en: Princess Rhaenys, I loved my husband, but I will speak the truth we both know.
You should've been queen.

dialogues.cn: 我可没想过能听到你这么说
dialogues.en: I little thought to hear those words from you.

dialogues.cn: 无论血脉还是气质 铁王座都应该是你的
dialogues.en: The Iron Throne was yours by blood and by temperament.

dialogues.cn: 韦赛里斯本可以做个乡下领主
dialogues.en: Viserys would've lived his days a country lord,

dialogues.cn: 狩猎 研究他那些历史 满足地过完一生
dialogues.en: content to hunt and study his histories,
but... here we are.

dialogues.cn: 我们不能统治 但我们可以指导男人统治
dialogues.en: We do not rule but we may guide the men that do.
Gently...

dialogues.cn: 远离暴力和毁灭 让国家走向和平
dialogues.en: away from violence and sure destruction and instead toward peace.

dialogues.cn: 你把我关在这里是为了和平吗?
dialogues.en: Is it in the name of peace that you've imprisoned me?
And what of my dragon?
If we are overmatched,

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉一定会袭击我们 随后就是战争
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra will be tempted to strike us, and war will ensue.

dialogues.cn: 如果没有你的龙 我们或许可以说服她谈判
dialogues.en: Without your dragon, she may be persuaded to negotiate.

dialogues.cn: 如果你想要潮头岛 它就是你的
dialogues.en: If it's Driftmark you want, you shall have it

dialogues.cn: 给你和你的外孙女 或传给你中意的人选
dialogues.en: for you and your granddaughters to pass on as you see fit.
You are wiser than I believed you to be...
Alicent Hightower.

dialogues.cn: 真正的王后会为子民权衡得失
dialogues.en: A true queen counts the cost to her people.
And yet you toil still in service to men.

dialogues.cn: 你父亲 你丈夫 你儿子
dialogues.en: Your father, your husband, your son.
You desire not to be free,

dialogues.cn: 而是在你监牢的墙上开一扇窗
dialogues.en: but to make a window in the wall of your prison.
Have you never imagined yourself...
on the Iron Throne?
I'll leave you with your thoughts.
Ring the bell when you have an answer.
My Prince.

dialogues.cn: 我想你就是神秘的白蛆吧
dialogues.en: You yourself are the mysterious White Worm, I take it.

dialogues.cn: 或者你也只不过是这颗臭洋葱上剥下的又一层皮？
dialogues.en: Or are you simply a further peel in this stinking onion?
My condolences on the passing of your king.
Where is Prince Aegon?

dialogues.cn: 我想 王子正在跳蚤窝呢 那儿的人可没法信任
dialogues.en: I thought, the Prince is in Flea Bottom where no one is to be trusted.

dialogues.cn: 我最好把他偷偷藏在一个安全的地方……免得有人来找他
dialogues.en: I'd best secrete him somewhere safe... in case they come looking for him.
Where's the Prince?

dialogues.cn: 他已经被安全地藏起来了
dialogues.en: He is safely tucked away.

dialogues.cn: 我希望停止对跳蚤窝孩子们的野蛮奴役
dialogues.en: I want an end to the savage use of children in Flea Bottom.

dialogues.cn: 他们被迫相互厮杀 甚至更糟……
dialogues.en: They are forced to fight, and worse...

dialogues.cn: 你那些金袍子收了贿赂 对此视而不见
dialogues.en: your gold cloaks take the bribes given them to look away.

dialogues.cn: 而朝廷对这种无耻之行不是纵容就是无视
dialogues.en: An obscenity either tolerated or ignored by the crown.
I'll look into it.
You have my word.
When your plots ripen
and you install your grandson on the throne,

dialogues.cn: 记住 那都是源于我的扶持
dialogues.en: remember it was me who put him there.

dialogues.cn: 我要是想杀他 容易得就像拍死水果上的黄蜂
dialogues.en: I could have killed him as easily as a wasp on fruit.

dialogues.cn: 没有民众的支持 你们哪来的权力
dialogues.en: There is no power but what the people allow you to take.
I will remember.
Listen.
No... No!
No!
Where is the White Worm?
She sold you for a price.
And why have you paid it?
I want my mother.

dialogues.cn: 你的外公 国王之手 在城外等你
dialogues.en: Your grandfather, the Hand, will meet you outside the city walls.

dialogues.cn: 他人拼死而不得的东西你却不想要 伊耿
dialogues.en: You flee what other men die seeking, Aegon.
I do regret this, friend.
No! Stop! No.
I was hoping you disappeared.
Is our father truly dead?

dialogues.cn: 对……而且他们打算让你当国王
dialogues.en: Yes... and they're going to make you king.

dialogues.cn: - 不要！- 你到底帮不帮忙？！
dialogues.en: -No! -Are you going to help me?!
No! Let me go!
Where's your brother, huh?
Let me go!
Brother!
Let me go!
I have no wish to rule!

dialogues.cn: 也没责任感！我根本不合适
dialogues.en: No taste for duty! I'm not suited.
You'll get no argument from me.

dialogues.cn: 放我走吧 我会找艘船 远走高飞
dialogues.en: You let me go, I will find a ship and sail away,
never to be found.
The Queen awaits.
Well played.
None of this is a game.

dialogues.cn: 但你依然把它当成游戏
dialogues.en: And yet you treat it as one.
A charming contest,
the prize, a pouch of silver.

dialogues.cn: 我们相互倚仗这么多年
dialogues.en: We have relied on one another these many years.

dialogues.cn: 现在正是争取家族利益的时机 这是我们共同的期望
dialogues.en: And now it is the good of the family that we both desire.

dialogues.cn: 无论有何分歧 我们总是一条心
dialogues.en: Whatever our differences, our hearts remain as one.
Our hearts were never one.
I see that now.

dialogues.cn: 我不过是你的一枚棋子罢了
dialogues.en: Rather, I have been a piece that you moved about the board.

dialogues.cn: 若真如此 我还让你成为了七大王国的王后
dialogues.en: If that is true, then I made you Queen of the Seven Kingdoms.
Would you have desired it otherwise?
How could I know?

dialogues.cn: 我的想法都是你灌输的
dialogues.en: I wanted whatever you impressed upon me to want.
And now the debt comes due.
A debt you were happy enough to pay.
A sacrifice.

dialogues.cn: 为了王国稳定而做出的牺牲
dialogues.en: A sacrifice made for the stability of the realm.

dialogues.cn: 还没有哪个国王不会为了保护多数人
dialogues.en: No king has ever lived that hasn't had to forfeit
the lives of a few to protect the many.

dialogues.cn: 不过我理解你的道德洁癖
dialogues.en: Though I understand your squeamishness.
Reluctance to murder is not a weakness!
I have Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 之后怎么办 由我决定
dialogues.en: We'll proceed now as I see fit.

dialogues.cn: 我们给龙石岛的雷妮拉开出条件
dialogues.en: We will send terms to Rhaenyra on Dragonstone.

dialogues.cn: 真诚的条件 这样她才能体面地接受
dialogues.en: True terms, such that she may accept without shame.

dialogues.cn: 如果她活着 她的盟友都会打着她的旗号
dialogues.en: If she lives, her allies will mass behind her banners,
looking for her return.
Then she must not return.

dialogues.cn: 我的丈夫也会希望自己女儿得到宽待
dialogues.en: My husband would have desired this mercy be shown to his daughter.
Your husband?

dialogues.cn: 还是你 他女儿的儿时闺蜜？
dialogues.en: Or you, his daughter's childhood companion?

dialogues.cn: 克里斯顿·科尔会被任命为御林铁卫队长
dialogues.en: Criston Cole will be named Lord Commander of the Kingsguard.

dialogues.cn: 我儿子明日黎明接受涂油礼
dialogues.en: My son will be anointed tomorrow at dawn.

dialogues.cn: 他必须在全君临的见证下登基
dialogues.en: The whole of King's Landing must witness his ascent.

dialogues.cn: 他要确立权威 事不宜迟
dialogues.en: He will assume authority. There will be no more dithering.

dialogues.cn: 我的儿子与征服者伊耿同名 也将继承他的王冠
dialogues.en: My son will take the crown of his namesake, the Conqueror,
and carry Blackfyre, his sword.

dialogues.cn: 人们将记起坦格利安家族的古老力量
dialogues.en: Let the people remember the ancient strength of House Targaryen.

dialogues.cn: 在某些方面 你真像你母亲
dialogues.en: You look so much like your mother in certain lights.
As you wish.
Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 现在已经很晚了 拉里斯大人
dialogues.en: The hour is late, Lord Larys.

dialogues.cn: 我发现了一件应当告知您的事
dialogues.en: I've found out something that you should know.
Have you asked yourself, I wonder...
how it is...that your father, the Hand...
found Aegon first?

dialogues.cn: 这红堡中的眼线织就了一张蛛网
dialogues.en: There is a web of spies at work in the Red Keep.

dialogues.cn: 丝线传递着我们的一举一动
dialogues.en: Along its threads travels news of all our doings.

dialogues.cn: 你父亲明知如此 却不予理会
dialogues.en: Your father knows this, but has left it in place.

dialogues.cn: 事实一次次证明 只要你愿意供养织网人
dialogues.en: More than once, it has proved advantageous to those willing to...
feed the weaver.

dialogues.cn: 而这个织网人在监视我？
dialogues.en: And this weaver watches me?

dialogues.cn: 有只小蜘蛛就是你的侍女
dialogues.en: One of the little spiders is your lady-in-waiting.
Talya?
There are more like her.
Even I do not know their number.

dialogues.cn: 有个法子可以摧毁他的优势
dialogues.en: There is one way to destroy his advantage.
It must be taken out at the head.

dialogues.cn: 没了蜂后 蜂群就是一盘散沙
dialogues.en: When the Queen dies, the bees fly without purpose.

dialogues.cn: 陛下 请原谅我作此比喻
dialogues.en: Begging your pardon for the turn of phrase, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 看来这件事正好是你的专长
dialogues.en: I assume this task falls within your expertise.
If you wish it...
it will be done.
Out of my way!
With me, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我不会纵容如此背信弃义
dialogues.en: I cannot let this treachery stand.
Where are we?
Just south of King's Way.
The Blackwater's this way.
I won't leave Meleys.
If I could get to the Dragonpit, then--

dialogues.cn: 不行 他们料定你会出现在那 公主
dialogues.en: No. They'll expect you there, Princess.
You won't get past the gates.
Now come.
You must make for the riverfront and find a ship.

dialogues.cn: 趁他们还没发觉你走了
dialogues.en: Before they know you've gone.
Move it! Go! Go!
This way!
Keep moving! That's right.
That's right!
Onward!
This way.
Halt! Halt!
Keep moving!
All of you, move forward!
Keep moving!
Out of the way!
Out of the way!

dialogues.cn: 起码做做样子 感激感激吧
dialogues.en: Have the decency to look grateful.

dialogues.cn: 你能有今天 知道我做了些什么吗
dialogues.en: Do you know what has been done to give you this day?

dialogues.cn: 一小时后 你就是国王
dialogues.en: In an hour, you will be king.

dialogues.cn: 父亲从来不是这样想的
dialogues.en: And my father never wanted this.
That's not true.

dialogues.cn: 20年来他随时可以指定我作继承人 却从来没有
dialogues.en: He had 20 years to name me heir and never did.

dialogues.cn: 他坚定地为雷妮拉的权利撑腰
dialogues.en: Steadfastly, he upheld Rhaenyra's claim.
He changed his mind.
Oh...No...

dialogues.cn: 他可以 但从来没有
dialogues.en: He could have, but he never did
because he didn't like me.
And yet, with his final breath,

dialogues.cn: 还是轻声跟我说 该由你来接替他继承王位
dialogues.en: he whispered to me that you should take his place on the throne.
Do not toy with me, Mother.
I speak the truth.
Listen to me, Aegon.

dialogues.cn: 你外公 国王之手 会给你灌输观念
dialogues.en: Your grandfather, the Hand, will try to impress on you
that Rhaenyra should be put to the sword.
You must reject this counsel.

dialogues.cn: 我们绝不能靠残暴和冷漠统治
dialogues.en: We must not rule with cruelty and callousness.

dialogues.cn: 不管她有什么错 她都是你姐姐 你父亲的女儿——
dialogues.en: For all her faults, she is your sister, your father's daughter--
Do you love me?
You imbecile.
Make way for the royal wheelhouse!
Hey, hey, forward then.

dialogues.cn: 继续 动起来 快点
dialogues.en: Go on, move yourself! Come on!
People of King's Landing...
today is the saddest of days.
Our beloved king...
Viserys the Peaceful...
is dead.

dialogues.cn: 但今天也是最喜悦的一天
dialogues.en: But it is also the most joyous of days...

dialogues.cn: 因为在他的英灵离开之际
dialogues.en: for as his spirit left us...
he whispered his final wish:
that his firstborn son, Aegon...
should succeed him.
Guards!
Out of the way! Move!
Halt!
Turn!
Present...
arms!
It is your great good fortune
and privilege... to be here to witness this:
a new day for our city...
a new day for our realm.
A new king... to lead us.
May the Warrior give him courage.

dialogues.cn: 愿铁匠注力量于其剑盾
dialogues.en: May the Smith lend strength to his sword and shield.
May the Father defend him in his need.

dialogues.cn: 愿老妪以明灯引其于路途
dialogues.en: May the Crone lift her shining lamp and light his way to wisdom.
The crown of the Conqueror, passed down through generations.
Let the Seven bear witness:

dialogues.cn: 伊耿·坦格利安即铁王座的真正继承人
dialogues.en: Aegon Targaryen is the true heir to the Iron Throne.
All hail His Grace, Aegon,

dialogues.cn: 安达尔人 洛伊拿人
dialogues.en: Second of his Name,
King of the Andals and the Rhoynar and the First Men,
Lord of the Seven Kingdoms
and Protector of the Realm.
Aegon the King!

dialogues.cn: 伊耿国王 伊耿国王万岁！
dialogues.en: Aegon the King! Long live Aegon!
Open the doors!
Open the doors!
Get Helaena.

dialogues.cn: 坦格利安家族征服维斯特洛

dialogues.en: “海蛇”“潮汛之主”
“无冕女王” 韦赛里斯一世的堂姐
“征服者”

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯一世（AC48-103 在位）
dialogues.en: “和解者”“人瑞王”

dialogues.cn: 杰赫里斯一世（AC48-103 在位）
dialogues.en: “和解者”“人瑞王”
“安宁王”
韦赛里斯一世的国王之手
奥托的女儿 韦赛里斯一世的第二任妻子
奥托的女儿 韦赛里斯一世的第二任妻子
“大伊耿” 韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的长子
韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的女儿 大伊耿的妻子
韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的次子
韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的三子
奥托的女儿 韦赛里斯一世的第二任妻子
“大伊耿” 韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的长子
韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的次子
韦赛里斯一世和阿莉森的长女 大伊耿的妻子
“小伊耿” 戴蒙和雷妮拉的长子
戴蒙和雷妮拉的次子
“浪荡王子” 贝尔隆的儿子 韦赛里斯一世的弟弟
“勇敢的”“春晓王子” 杰赫里斯一世的儿子和国王之手
贝尔隆的妹妹和妻子
“善良王后” 杰赫里斯一世的妹妹和妻子
伊耿一世的妹妹和妻子

dialogues.cn: 改编自 《血与火：坦格利安王朝史》
dialogues.en: [美] 乔治·马丁 著

dialogues.cn: 龙 王 家 族
绿党会议 The Green Council
韦赛里斯·坦格利安一世
dialogues.en: 国王
御林铁卫队长
大学士
财政大臣
凯岩城公爵杰森的双胞胎弟弟 海政大臣
法务大臣
王后的父亲 国王之手
摄政王后 奥托之女
王后的侍女
御林铁卫
亚历克的孪生兄弟 御林铁卫
亚历克的孪生兄弟 御林铁卫
“大伊耿” 韦赛里斯与阿莉森的长子
韦赛里斯与阿莉森的次子
韦赛里斯与阿莉森的女儿
“无冕女王” 韦赛里斯一世的堂姐 科利斯的妻子
“白蛆” “小梅夫人”
雷妮丝的龙
“弯足” 赫伦堡伯爵

dialogues.cn: 龙穴正门上方的高等瓦雷利亚文字 Tego ēlior vēttir dāro lyks kessa 意为
dialogues.en: “全境的第一律法就是以国王之名维护和平”，是伊耿一世征服维斯特洛后颁布的法令。

dialogues.cn: 此为“征服者”伊耿一世的瓦雷利亚钢王冠，有别于韦赛里斯一世的黄金王冠。
此为坦格利安家族的瓦雷利亚钢剑“黑火”，曾为“征服者”伊耿一世所使用。
七神在上 今日吾王 伊耿二世……
dialogues.en: ……力寻正义 智辨是非 祈求圣母…… 祈求战士 升平之际 赐武于锋 赐勇于…… ……王国富庶 祈求少女 看护王后…… ……暗中之路 祈求陌客 敬勿登门 直至终…… 七神在上 我们感谢诸神之慈悲与荣光 赞美诸神之智慧…… 遥想征服者 伊耿一世…… 土浸鲜血 剑铸王座 七神在上 我们臣服于诸神之裁决 国王屈膝于…… 王亦如是 我们铭记 灾祸降临圣堂…… 老妪高举明灯 叛贼无处遁形 我们赞美…… 此地龙穴 今日盛典…… 七神在上 赐福祝圣 我们祈求 您之忠仆…… ……先民 七国之王 全境守护者…… 愿天父救他于危难 愿老妪举她之…… 慈悲七神 涤尽吾等之罪 回报吾等之忠…… 抵御吾等之敌
